label: false-dup
a: BM25 length normalisation (k1=1.5, b=0.75) fixed the long-document dominance problem in retrieval/bm25.py.
b: BM25 scoring in retrieval/bm25.py does not currently emit per-term debug weights. Adding a --verbose flag to the debug CLI would help when diagnosing future scoring anomalies.
reviewer_notes: Both about bm25.py, but one describes a fix that landed, the other describes missing observability. Keeping both is correct — deduplicating them would erase useful context.
